item.title: Kridhan Infra Ltd Falls 12.96%: 2 Key Events Mark a Challenging Week
item.description: Kridhan Infra Ltd’s shares declined sharply over the week ending 20 Mar 2026, falling 12.96% from Rs.2.70 to Rs.2.35, significantly underperforming the Sensex which dipped marginally by 0.28%. The stock faced intense selling pressure early in the week, hitting a lower circuit on 16 Mar, followed by a fresh 52-week low on 18 Mar, reflecting persistent weakness amid broader market volatility and sectoral challenges. Time: Mar 28 2026 05:21 PM IST

item.title: RRP Defense Ltd Falls 1.00%: Downgrade and Technical Shift Mark a Cautious Week
item.description: RRP Defense Ltd closed the week at ₹813.70, down 1.00% from the previous Friday’s close of ₹821.90, underperforming the Sensex which declined 0.28% over the same period. The week was marked by a significant downgrade to a Sell rating amid technical weakness and stretched valuation concerns, alongside a notable shift in technical momentum from mildly bullish to sideways. Despite strong financial fundamentals, the stock’s price action reflected investor caution and a pause in upward momentum. Time: Mar 28 2026 05:21 PM IST

item.title: Gayatri Projects Gains 4.97%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Rally
item.description: Gayatri Projects Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 4.97% from Rs.12.87 to Rs.13.51 between 16 and 20 March 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined marginally by 0.28% over the same period. The stock hit a new 52-week high on 16 March and was upgraded from 'Sell' to 'Hold' by MarketsMOJO on the same day, reflecting improved technicals and robust quarterly financial results. Time: Mar 28 2026 05:21 PM IST

item.title: DMCC Speciality Chemicals Gains 3.51%: 4 Key Factors Driving the Week
item.description: DMCC Speciality Chemicals Ltd recorded a modest weekly gain of 3.51%, closing at ₹219.45 on 20 March 2026, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28% over the same period. The week was marked by fluctuating technical momentum, a downgrade to a Sell rating by MarketsMOJO, mixed technical signals, and a final day recovery that capped a volatile trading session. Time: Mar 28 2026 05:21 PM IST

item.title: Maha Rashtra Apex Corporation Ltd Plunges 51.13%: Key Events Behind the Sharp Decline
item.description: Maha Rashtra Apex Corporation Ltd experienced a tumultuous week from 16 to 20 March 2026, with its share price plunging 51.13% to close at Rs.56.46, sharply underperforming the Sensex which declined marginally by 0.28%. The week was marked by a technical upgrade to a 'Sell' rating midweek, followed by a dramatic drop to a new 52-week low amid heightened volatility and sustained selling pressure. Time: Mar 28 2026 05:21 PM IST

item.title: Wipro Ltd Falls 3.29% Amidst 52-Week Lows and Bearish Sentiment
item.description: Wipro Ltd’s shares declined by 3.29% over the week ending 20 March 2026, closing at Rs.191.05 from Rs.197.55 the previous Friday. This underperformance contrasted with the Sensex’s marginal 0.28% fall, reflecting persistent bearish pressures on the stock amid fresh 52-week lows, heightened put option activity, and subdued financial metrics. Despite a brief rebound midweek, the stock remained below key moving averages and faced technical and fundamental headwinds throughout the week. Time: Mar 28 2026 05:21 PM IST

item.title: Foseco India Gains 10.01%: 5 Key Factors Driving This Week’s Momentum
item.description: Foseco India Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 10.01% from Rs.4,750.00 to Rs.5,225.40 between 16 and 20 March 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28% over the same period. The stock’s price action was marked by notable intraday volatility, technical momentum shifts, and a key upgrade in its investment rating, reflecting a complex but cautiously optimistic outlook amid mixed financial results and broader market volatility. Time: Mar 28 2026 05:21 PM IST

item.title: Raj Rayon Industries Ltd Falls 4.84%: Circuit Hits and Volatility Define the Week
item.description: Raj Rayon Industries Ltd experienced a turbulent week from 16 to 20 March 2026, closing at Rs.20.84, down 4.84% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.21.90. This decline contrasted with the broader Sensex, which fell marginally by 0.28% over the same period. The stock’s week was marked by sharp swings, including hitting both lower and upper circuit limits amid fluctuating investor sentiment and low liquidity, reflecting ongoing challenges for this micro-cap garment and apparel company. Time: Mar 28 2026 05:21 PM IST

item.title: Balkrishna Industries Ltd Drops 5.42%: 2 Key Technical Signals Shape the Week
item.description: Balkrishna Industries Ltd experienced a challenging week from 16 to 20 March 2026, with its stock price declining 5.42% to close at Rs.2,104.30, significantly underperforming the Sensex which fell a marginal 0.28%. The week was marked by a fresh 52-week low, sectoral headwinds, and the formation of a bearish Death Cross technical pattern, signalling potential further downside risk amid ongoing market pressures. Time: Mar 28 2026 05:21 PM IST
